creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi.

If I would update ImageMagick to every single revision, that would be
updating 10 times a month.
I usually update to patchlevel 10, that is once a month and the
distfiles are kept for a long time.

6.7.0-2 was an exception (6.6.9-10 failed to compile).

So the next update I plan is 6.7.0-10

Cheers,
mm

-- 
Martin Matuska
FreeBSD committer
http://blog.vx.sk
